MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) PTR-18-302352 WITH CASE CGC-18-570472
Off Calendar Mar-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROMAN SCANLON MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) PTR-18-302352 WITH CASE CGC-18-570472 - Action CGC-18-570472 is stayed pending the determination of validity of the trust amendments in action PTR-18-302352. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
